title: Zara's Yummy Colors
synopsis: Baby Zara discovers colorful foods with delightful sounds and reactions. From red apples that go 'crunch' to yellow bananas that make her say 'mmm,' each page introduces a vibrant color through tasty foods that babies love.

illustration.description: Baby Zara with warm brown skin and soft black curls sits in a high chair, holding a bright red apple with both tiny hands. Her dark eyes are wide with delight as she takes a bite. The background is soft cream with red watercolor splashes.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara eating a red apple in her high chair

illustration.description: Zara squeezes orange slices between her fingers, orange juice dripping down her chin. She wears a white bib with orange polka dots. Her expression shows pure joy and curiosity. Soft orange watercolor washes fill the background.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara playing with orange slices

illustration.description: Zara holds a peeled yellow banana, taking a big bite with her mouth open wide. Banana pieces stick to her cheeks. Her caregiver, a woman with dark skin and braided hair, smiles warmly in the soft yellow background.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara eating a yellow banana with her caregiver nearby

illustration.description: Zara sits with mashed green peas on her tray, some in her mouth, some smeared on her face. She claps her hands together, creating little green splatters. The background features gentle green watercolor leaves and vines.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara playing with green peas

illustration.description: Zara carefully picks up small purple grapes one by one, her concentration evident in her furrowed brow. Her father, a man with light brown skin and glasses, supervises nearby. Soft purple watercolor circles float in the background.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara eating purple grapes with her father watching

illustration.description: Zara drinks from a sippy cup filled with blue smoothie, made from blueberries. Blue liquid drips down her chin onto her bib. Fresh blueberries scatter on her tray. The background shows soft blue watercolor swirls.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara drinking blue smoothie from sippy cup

illustration.description: Zara tilts back a small cup of white milk, her eyes closed in satisfaction. Milk mustache forms on her upper lip. Her grandmother, an elderly woman with silver hair and warm smile, sits beside her. Soft white and cream tones fill the background.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara drinking white milk with grandmother

pages.text: Yummy colors everywhere! Zara claps and smiles.

illustration.description: Zara sits surrounded by all the colorful foods from previous pages, clapping her hands with pure delight. Rainbow watercolor splatters dance around her. Her whole family - caregiver, father, and grandmother - stand behind her, all smiling warmly.
illustration.alt: Baby Zara celebrating with colorful foods and family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Zara's apple?
questions.explanation: Zara eats a red apple that goes 'crunch, crunch!'

questions.question: What sound do the grapes make?
questions.explanation: The purple grapes make a 'pop, pop!' sound when Zara eats them.

questions.question: Who helps Zara with the grapes?
questions.explanation: Zara's father with glasses supervises while she eats the purple grapes.
